summary: Changed the active AskUserQuestion tab background from invalid accent to selectedBg and added a static test guard for invalid theme.bg colors.
filesChanged: extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts - active tab highlight uses selectedBg
extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh - validates theme.bg color names against allowed ThemeBg values
raw:
## Completed
Fixed the AskUserQuestion runtime crash by changing the active question tab background from invalid `accent` to valid `selectedBg`. Added a static guard to the logic test to fail if `theme.bg("...")` uses anything outside pi’s allowed ThemeBg names.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - active tab highlight now uses `selectedBg`.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - added grep-based validation for `theme.bg(...)` color names.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified the test passes.
